title: FOIA Request: Records on Shawn Monper (Butler, PA) – FBI Investigation and “Mr. Satan” YouTube Threats

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request all records concerning Shawn Monper of Butler, Pennsylvania (also referenced in connection with “Mr. Satan” YouTube account).

Please include, but do not limit to:
•  All investigative files, case files, and reports related to threats against President Donald J. Trump, U.S. officials, and ICE agents (2025 case).
•  Communications, tips, or referrals involving the FBI’s National Threat Operations Section.
•  Records of his arrest (approx. April 2025), search warrants, affidavits, and firearms permit/background checks.
•  Any electronic communications, social media monitoring, or YouTube-related records.
•  Cross-references to Butler Township Police Department collaboration.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Citizen Commission
